# David Adesina - davidadesina.com

> Official website of David Adesina. Core focus: writing (Find Your Ink), revival ministry (Cave Echoes), and faith-based cinematic storytelling (GleamShield Production).

## Canonical Domain

- https://davidadesina.com

## Key Organizations and Projects

- Find Your Ink (on-site writing publication)
- Cave Echoes (revival ministry)
- GleamShield Production (faith-based animation universe, hosted at /gleamshield/)
- Remshield (AI engineering business): https://remshield.solutions/
